hero.title: Building the Future of AI-Powered Development
hero.subtitle: We're on a mission to enable seamless collaboration between humans and AI coding agents, transforming how software is built.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: AgentsMesh was founded with a simple belief: the future of software development lies in the collaboration between humans and AI agents. We're building the infrastructure that enables multiple AI coding agents to work together, coordinated by human developers, to tackle complex development challenges at unprecedented speed and scale.

autonomous.title: Autonomous Execution
autonomous.content: AI agents should be able to independently complete complex tasks, not just assist with code completion.

collaboration.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration
collaboration.content: The most complex problems require multiple specialized agents working together seamlessly.

security.title: Data Sovereignty
security.content: Your code and data should never leave your infrastructure without your explicit consent.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.content: Interested in learning more about AgentsMesh or exploring partnership opportunities?

hero.title: Join Us in Shaping the Future
hero.subtitle: We're building the platform that enables AI agents to collaborate on complex development tasks. Join us in this exciting journey.

harnessEngineer.title: Harness Engineer
harnessEngineer.description: Harness Engineers architect the runtime environments where AI agents operate. You'll design sandboxes, define execution constraints, and build the infrastructure that keeps agents secure, isolated, and performant.
harnessEngineer.resp1: Design and build secure, isolated runtime environments for AI agents
harnessEngineer.resp2: Define execution constraints, permission boundaries, and safety guardrails
harnessEngineer.resp3: Develop and optimize sandbox infrastructure for reproducible agent operations

producer.title: Builder
producer.description: Builders turn infrastructure into products that users love. You'll bridge the gap between technical capabilities and user needs, shaping every interaction with AgentsMesh into an intuitive and powerful experience.
producer.resp1: Translate user needs into product requirements and features
producer.resp2: Shape platform capabilities into polished, user-facing products
producer.resp3: Gather feedback and iterate to deliver exceptional user experiences

growthHacker.title: GTM (Go to Market)
growthHacker.description: GTM specialists take our product to market with creative, data-driven strategies. You'll help developers discover AgentsMesh, run rapid experiments, and turn early adopters into passionate advocates.
growthHacker.resp1: Design and execute data-driven growth experiments
growthHacker.resp2: Build relationships with developer communities and drive adoption
growthHacker.resp3: Optimize acquisition funnels and drive user retention

innovation.title: Cutting-Edge Technology
innovation.content: Work with the latest AI technologies and shape the future of software development.

remote.title: Remote-First
remote.content: Work from anywhere in the world with a flexible schedule that fits your life.

equity.title: Competitive Package
equity.content: Competitive salary, equity participation, and comprehensive benefits.

cta.title: Don't See a Perfect Fit?
cta.content: We're always looking for exceptional talent. Send us your resume and tell us how you'd contribute.

hero.title: Blog
hero.subtitle: Technical insights, product updates, and stories from the AgentsMesh team.

hero.title: Diseñado para
hero.subtitle: Seguridad, cumplimiento y despliegue autoalojado para organizaciones que exigen control total sobre su infraestructura de agentes de IA.

onpremise.title: Despliegue
onpremise.description: Implemente AgentsMesh completamente dentro de su propia infraestructura. Su código y datos nunca salen de su red.
